title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Python/JS bindings to pull and run Llama-2, Mistral, Gemma, etc. locally with GPU/Metal acceleration.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python client library for the Ollama REST API (PyPI package ollama).

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers (npm package ollama).

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use Ollama models as LLMs, embeddings, tool-callers.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Full-featured ChatGPT-like web UI for Ollama (Docker-ready).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with streaming, embeddings, list/delete models.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem providing idiomatic client for Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-cli-crystal
summary: Crystal-lang CLI wrapper around the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models as inline Copilot chats.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama server & web-ui in Kubernetes.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker image (ollama/ollama) with CUDA & ROCm variants.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Ready-to-run Retrieval-Augmented Generation stack using Ollama + Chroma.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app to expose Ollama models as Slack AI assistant.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: n8n community node to call Ollama chat/completion inside workflows.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration to use Ollama as generator or chat model.

title: ollama-fastapi
summary: FastAPI service exposing extra endpoints (batch, embeddings, health) over Ollama.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM prompts on selected notes via Ollama.

title: ollama-logseq
summary: Logseq plugin integrating Ollama for on-device AI assistance.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate offering async client for Ollama API with serde types.
